records.heading: Observe RHP-015.5 sealed commit/current HEAD
records.why: RHP-015.6 starts from the already-published RHP-015.5 seal.

records.heading: Resolve CI claims by commit subject
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m rhp.ci_subject_resolver --previous-commit fe7c310e1cebb32e0b3b497231ed87cb254be992 --previous-ci-status green --current-head 2c5b2b62e041ac8972110becb5a14085c1c1a080 --current-head-ci-status pending --source operator-provided --out C:\Users\jacks\OneDrive\Desktop\hermes-agent-evo\docs\context-layer\ops\RHP-015-6-evidence-api-compatibility-claim-ledger-replay\ci-subject-resolution.json
records.why: Prevent previous green claims from silently applying to current HEAD.

records.heading: Run evidence API compatibility gate
records.why: Fail if public evidence/check fields disappear or authority flags are not false.

records.heading: Replay latest operation from evidence
records.why: Prove latest operation is reconstructable from pointer/evidence/summaries/dashboard.

records.heading: Compile RHP-015.6 claim/evidence/replay surfaces
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m py_compile rhp/claim_ledger.py rhp/ci_subject_resolver.py rhp/evidence_api_compatibility_gate.py rhp/rhpload_replay.py tests/test_rhp_015_6_claim_ledger.py tests/test_rhp_015_6_ci_subject_resolver.py tests/test_rhp_015_6_evidence_api_compatibility_gate.py tests/test_rhp_015_6_rhpload_replay.py
records.why: Catch syntax/import issues before focused tests.

records.heading: Run claim/evidence/replay focused tests
records.command: C:\Program Files\Python312\python.exe -m pytest -q -o addopts= tests/test_rhp_015_6_claim_ledger.py tests/test_rhp_015_6_ci_subject_resolver.py tests/test_rhp_015_6_evidence_api_compatibility_gate.py tests/test_rhp_015_6_rhpload_replay.py
records.why: Prove claim subject accounting, evidence API compatibility, and replay scaffold before push.
